items.title: [负面] It's was a fun game for a while, but after a first...
items.summary: It's was a fun game for a while, but after a first chapter it's just an absolute pay-to-win and play-to-win. PVP is busted, PVE becomes dull and boring number stacking - no strategy and room for improvisation whatsoever. People saw Slay the Spire and made a good job of translating it to the online game. Characters are superb, voices and story (allegedly, because how would I know if those shills can't put money into localization?) is great too. There is just nothing left to do except to grind... Literally listen to podcasts and play on autopilote because of how 1 buttoned the whole thing becomes. I don't recommend it due to aggresive monetisation and the fact that game gets dull. If you liked Slay the Spire - give it a go for one evening, but not more than that.
